title: lathyrus humilis
intro: Lathyrus humilis, also known as the low-growing pea, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lathyrus humilis include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and act as an antispasmodic to alleviate muscle cramps and spasms. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support overall health and well-being, although its preparation and dosage should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
